PatchNotes_328: Sentinel of Radiance: PERMANENT (no more duration)
Atlas rework: Maps no longer tied to specific area names
Nightmare Maps (T17): grant Atlas Skill Points
New gem: Siphoning Trap of Pain (Int/Dex)

Phase1_Lv1_11.Label: Before Absolution (Lv1-11)
Phase1_Lv1_11.Note: Pick up gear with Life + Resistance. Don't stress about gear.

Phase2_Lv12_32.Label: Starting Absolution (Lv12-32)
Phase2_Lv12_32.MainSkill: Absolution + Added Lightning Damage + Added Fire Damage
Phase2_Lv12_32.Support: Holy Flame Totem (clear support + boss distraction)
Phase2_Lv12_32.PassiveGoal: Spiritual Command → Enduring Bond (MOST IMPORTANT NODE)
Phase2_Lv12_32.Note: Take Unholy Might early (1 point), DROP it when you get Enduring Bond at Lv22

Phase3_Lv33_44.Label: First Ascendancy + Upgrades (Lv33-44)
Phase3_Lv33_44.MainSkill: Absolution + Added Lightning + Added Fire + Physical to Lightning
Phase3_Lv33_44.Ascendancy: Radiant Crusade → Sentinel of Radiance (PERMANENT in 3.28, 20% dmg mitigation)
Phase3_Lv33_44.Note: DELETE Unholy Might mastery when you have Physical to Lightning! Chaos dmg is no longer effective.

Phase4_Lv45_70.Label: Golem + Road to Maps (Lv45-70)
Phase4_Lv45_70.MainSkill: Absolution + Physical to Lightning + Spellslinger Core + Added Fire/Lightning
Phase4_Lv45_70.Note: Find Vaal Absolution — Sentinel 300% damage in 3.28!

Phase5_Lv70_89.Label: Early Maps (Lv70-89)
Phase5_Lv70_89.Defense: Block nodes: Sanctuary + Safeguard + Mystic Bark (~40% attack, ~67% spell block)
Phase5_Lv70_89.Keystone: Eldritch Battery (use ES instead of Mana, cast continuously)
Phase5_Lv70_89.WandTrigger: Elemental Weakness + Desecrate + Spirit Offering (auto-cast on skill use)
Phase5_Lv70_89.Flask: Rithen Jar — summons worms, kill to stack 3 Sentinels before boss
Phase5_Lv70_89.Note: Take Enduring Composure (Lv90-96) for Endurance Charges

Phase6_Lv90_95.Label: Full Setup (Lv90-95)
Phase6_Lv90_95.Note: Farm currency for Doryani's Prototype setup

Phase7_Lv96_plus.Label: Doryani's Prototype Endgame (Lv96+)
Phase7_Lv96_plus.UniqueGear: Doryani's Prototype + Dawn Breaker + Glorious Vanity (Xibaqua → Divine Flesh)
Phase7_Lv96_plus.Ascendancy: Chaos Ascendancy — Corruption Embrace (requires 4 corrupted items)
Requirements: Chaos Resistance MUST BE CAPPED (due to Divine Flesh)
Run Purity of Fire to cap Fire Res
At least 4 corrupted items for Shaper of Souls
Vaal Absolution cost reduced to 5 souls
Phase7_Lv96_plus.Note: Dawn Breaker reduces block when taking fire dmg — high HP compensates

PassiveTreeStages.Name: Stage 3: Enduring Bond ⭐
PassiveTreeStages.PassiveGoal: To Enduring Bond — MOST IMPORTANT NODE

PassiveTreeStages.Name: Stage 4: Radiant Crusade
PassiveTreeStages.PassiveGoal: Radiant Crusade ascendancy — Drop Unholy Might mastery

PassiveTreeStages.Name: Stage 8: Doryani's Prototype
PassiveTreeStages.PassiveGoal: Chaos Ascendancy (4 corrupted) — Cap Chaos Res!

NewbieTips: Always prioritize Life and Resistance on gear — golden rule
Don't need perfect gear to clear campaign — just move on
Enduring Bond is the most important passive node — don't skip it
Rithen Jar flask is cheap and very handy to stack Sentinels before boss
Shield Charge + Frost Blink for movement — don't walk
Sentinel of Radiance is PERMANENT in 3.28 — only resummon when dead/changing zone
Use Golem for simplicity if you don't understand Spectres yet
Vaal Absolution requires souls — use Rithen Jar to generate souls quickly
After Eldritch Battery: DO NOT invest in Mana, focus on ES + Life
Type /passives at end of campaign to check if you have all quest passive points
